utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with costs: 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs; both subcomponents list plan names and monthly costs, plus a total_monthly_cost—meets requirement. 2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs and valuable items coverage with costs, plus total—meets requirement. 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs and total—meets requirement. 4) additional_services: enhancement services with costs and total—meets requirement. 5) total_budget: monthly and annual cost breakdown provided (monthly_total and annual_total) along with extra budget details—meets requirement. Therefore, all 5 items are included and fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item in the final coverage plan to its corresponding rating from the ground-truth. The final plan includes: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, LifeFirst Standard Plan for mental health, Telemedicine Services, LifeFirst Standard Coverage for home contents, Premium coverage for fine art/electronics (not present in ground-truth; no mapping), LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel, and Premium Insurance Membership. From the ground-truth: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health) rating 8; Telemedicine Services rating 9; LifeFirst Standard Coverage (home content) rating 8; LifeFirst Standard Plan (travel insurance) rating 7; Premium Insurance Membership rating 10. We only include items that exist in the ground-truth.
